zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde De Allodio De Neyghem於1152年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫內格姆時，她的父親Hauwel Henri II De Quievrain25歲，母親Gertrude van Neyghem27歲。她和Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1219年享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde De Allodio De Neyghem was born in 1152, in Neigem, East Flanders, Belgium, her father, Hauwel Henri II De Quievrain, was 25 and her mother, Gertrude van Neyghem, was 27. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy. She died in 1219, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde De Allodio De Neyghem est née en 1152, à Neigem, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Hauwel Henri II De Quievrain, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Gertrude van Neyghem, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy. Elle est décédée en 1219, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde De Allodio De Neyghem 1152 in Neigem, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hauwel Henri II De Quievrain 25 und ihre Mutter Gertrude van Neyghem 27. Sie hatte mit Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1219 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde De Allodio De Neyghem è nata il nel 1152 nel Neigem, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, sua padre, Hauwel Henri II De Quievrain, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Gertrude van Neyghem, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy. Morì nel 1219, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde De Allodio De Neyghemが1152年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンネイジェムで生まれた時，父Hauwel Henri II De Quievrainは25歳，母Gertrude van Neyghemは27歳であった。彼女はChevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1219年に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde De Allodio De Neyghem(이)가 1152년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 나이그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hauwel Henri II De Quievrain(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrude van Neyghem(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1219년 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde De Allodio De Neyghem nasceu em 1152, em Neigem, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Hauwel Henri II De Quievrain, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude van Neyghem, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy. Ela faleceu em 1219, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde De Allodio De Neyghem родилась в 1152 г. в местности нигем, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Hauwel Henri II De Quievrain было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude van Neyghem, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy. Она умерла в 1219 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde De Allodio De Neyghem nació en 1152, en Neigem, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Hauwel Henri II De Quievrain, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Gertrude van Neyghem, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy. Murió en 1219, a la edad de 67 años.
